title: Remove beta feedback banner from project navigation panel
prompt:
Remove the entire beta feedback banner from the web-ui.

Context:
- The banner is the feedback component in web-ui/src/components/project-navigation-panel.tsx (around line 566-586). It renders the text "Kanban is in beta. Help us improve by sharing your experience." plus a "Send feedback" / "Report issue" button.

Requirements:
1. Remove the entire banner component (the JSX block with the beta sentence AND the feedback/report button) and remove where it is rendered in the panel.
2. Clean up any now-unused props, imports, helpers, constants (e.g. shouldShowFeaturebaseFeedback, featurebaseFeedbackState, GITHUB_ISSUES_URL, Info/ExternalLink icons) that become dead after removal. Do not leave unused code.
3. Update or remove the related tests in web-ui/src/components/project-navigation-panel.test.tsx that assert on the banner text (around lines 195 and 209).
4. Ensure the project still type-checks, lints, and tests pass.

Note: This is only about the in-app banner. Do NOT touch web-ui/src/hooks/kanban-access-blocked-fallback.tsx (that is a separate enterprise-access message).
